name: Outreach
tagline: Sales execution platform for enterprise teams
description: Outreach is a leading sales execution platform used by enterprise sales teams. It combines sequences, dialler, deal intelligence, forecasting, and conversation intelligence — giving sales managers full visibility over their pipeline.
use_cases: You run an enterprise sales team and need full pipeline visibility — sequences, calls, deal intelligence, and forecasting in one platform
Your sales manager wants conversation intelligence to review rep calls, score them, and coach based on real data
You use Salesforce as your CRM and need a sales engagement layer with deep two-way sync for sequences and activity logging
Your revenue operations team needs sales forecasting and pipeline analytics that go beyond what your CRM provides natively
